name: Rizi o Graten (Rice Au Gratin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the broth with 2 tbsp of butter.
2. Add rice, stirring so it doesn't stick.
3. Add salt and pepper.
4. Cover pot and simmer until liquid is absorbed (about 15 minutes).
5. Add 2/3 of the cheese, mix well, then remove from heat.
6. Half cool. Beat eggs lightly and add to rice.
7. Add ham and mix in well with a fork.
8. Butter a baking pan.
9. Put rice in and spread evenly.
10. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bread crumbs.
11. Melt the remaining butter and drizzle over the top of the rice.
12. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Serves 4-6.
